title: EmailTemplateSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents an org’s email template settings. This type extends the Metadata metadata type and inherits its fullName field.

enableTemplateEnhancedFolderPref.description: Indicates whether Folders and Enhanced Sharing for Email Templates is enabled (true) or not (false). This feature allows users to create and manage folders for email templates. Default value is false.

declarative_metadata_sample_definition.description: The package file references the following EmaillTemplate.settings file.
